programmes.show_description: Anj Kay jumps in the mix to get you in your feels with some R&B and slow jams Throwbacks!

programmes.show_name: Asian Network's Club Hit Squad Mix
programmes.show_description: Nothing screams a Club Hit Squad experience like a celebrations Garage mix! Your'll hear music from Sevaqk, Champion, DJ Lyan, Sliime, Tommy Villiers and Diljit Dosanjh.

programmes.show_name: Asian Network's Club Hit Squad Mix
programmes.show_description: It's time to step into a new season of spring in this week's Club Hit Squad Mix. A 30 minute mix dedicated to some of those songs that just make you happy.

...Throwbacks with SMASHBengali. SMASHBengali blasts throwback gold, bringing a mix of everything from the good old times. It's everything you need to sing to whilst cracking on with your day.
...Throwbacks with Gagan Grewal. Join Gagan for the best of Bollywood Throwbacks from the 80s, 90s and 2000s!
...Throwbacks with Dipps Bhamrah. Dipps Bhamrah brings you a special throwbacks edition, taking you back in time with three hours of nonstop anthems and old school Bhangra bangers.

Bobby looks back at Schooling The Nation, Live Jam and Future Friction tracks. Contains strong language.
Gura and Smash pick a song for some of their favourite characters and TV personalities - but do you agree with their picks? Contains some strong language and adult humour.
SMASHBengali and Gura share One Last Chai! For the final episode, they write a letter to each other and reminisce about some of the best bits from the last two years!
This week's Bhangra Bounce mix brings you next level nostalgia, 30 minutes of sounds that defined memories across the decades.

programmes.show_name: The Everyday Hustle with Harleen Nottay
programmes.show_description: Gulshen Bano, who runs female only self defence groups around the world, joins Harleen Nottay to discuss how she went from working in a pharmacy to running this business.

programmes.show_name: Asian Network Motivation with Sarover Aulja
programmes.show_description: Always saying yes when you mean no? Sarover explores people pleasing in South Asian communities, setting boundaries and choosing yourself.
